properties.name: walkie.tls.enabled
properties.description: Whether the server serves HTTPS/WSS (transport TLS). On by default; set to false to serve plain HTTP (e.g. behind a TLS-terminating reverse proxy). Read at runtime by TlsConfiguration (not @ConditionalOnProperty, so the toggle survives AOT/native).

properties.name: walkie.channel-affinity
properties.description: Multi-instance channel-affinity routing. When true, a socket may only serve a channel this instance owns (the handshake ?channel= it was routed to, or one it already hosts); a switch to a channel owned by another instance is refused with CHANNEL_ROUTING_MISMATCH so the client reconnects and the router re-pins it. Requires a channel-aware ingress that consistent-hashes the ?channel= query param. Off (default) = single instance: every channel is served locally.
